n: Instance: Fate of the Moulder-wood, Part 9

steps.t: Test the Pale Blight serum that the Viznak and the Rangers made to ensure it protects the imbiber from the rot.
You drank the serum, now it is time to eat the blighted mushrooms and see what happens!
You drank the serum and ate the mushrooms. Speak with Viznak again to see what is next.
